finding_text: hot_stone ranks #1 by proxy net profit at EUR 44.69 per treatment.
scrub has the lowest proxy net profit at EUR 30.36 per treatment in the current v1 structure.
reflexology shows the highest proxy net margin at 48.00%.
hot_stone shows the lowest proxy net margin at 41.00% in the current v1 structure.
All current treatments classify as labor-led under the locked proxy structure, indicating labor remains the dominant direct cost driver versus material cost.

finding_title: Higher-priced tier supports stronger absolute profit
finding_text: Premium-priced treatments tend to lead in absolute proxy net profit, while some core treatments remain stronger on margin percentage efficiency.
These findings come from proxy-first economics v1 and should be read as structured directional signals, not final assumption-driven unit economics.
